tavily.raw: {"query":"Boeing Farnborough International Airshow 2026 MQ-28 Ghost Bat 777X cabin CH-47 Chinook exhibits details","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://aerospaceglobalnews.com/news/boeing-farnborough-international-airshow-2026","title":"Boeing at Farnborough International Airshow 2026: What to expect","content":"# What to expect from Boeing at Farnborough International Airshow 2026. At the Farnborough International Airshow, Boeing will showcase the MQ-28 Ghost Bat, a full-size 777X cabin, Chinook helicopter and technologies. **Boeing** will return to the **Farnborough International Airshow** with an expanded presence compared with its scaled-back appearance in 2024. “At Farnborough, we look forward to reconnecting with our customers and suppliers, and strengthening our international partnerships — including Boeing’s more than 85‑year commitment to the United Kingdom — built upon the full range of our commercial, defence and services capabilities.”. Perhaps the most significant attraction on Boeing’s stand will be the first-ever Farnborough appearance of the MQ-28 Ghost Bat. Developed in Australia in partnership with the **Royal Australian Air Force**, the uncrewed collaborative combat aircraft is designed to operate alongside crewed fighters, carrying out missions such as:. The Ghost Bat has become one of Boeing Defence Australia’s flagship programmes and represents the company’s advances in autonomous military aviation.","score":0.9055316,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://investors.boeing.com/investors/news/press-release-details/2026/Boeing-to-Showcase-Global-Programs-and-Partnerships-at-Farnborough-International-Airshow/default.aspx","title":"Boeing Company - Boeing to Showcase Global Programs and Partnerships at Farnborough International Airshow","content":"### Boeing to Showcase Global Programs and Partnerships at Farnborough International Airshow. FARNBOROUGH, United Kingdom, July 13, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Boeing [NYSE: BA] will showcase its leading commercial, defense and services portfolio at the Farnborough International Airshow, reaffirming its commitment to customers, collaboration and the future of aerospace. \"At Farnborough, we look forward to reconnecting with our customers and suppliers, and strengthening our international partnerships — including Boeing's more than 85‑year commitment to the United Kingdom — built upon the full range of our commercial, defense and services capabilities.\". For the first time, the uncrewed MQ-28 Ghost Bat collaborative combat aircraft — designed to augment crewed aircraft by performing roles such as surveillance, electronic warfare and force multiplication — will debut on static display at the airshow. The exhibit will also feature the T-7 flight deck simulator, providing a hands-on experience of the fighter trainer's performance and capabilities. For more information about Boeing activities at the show, visit: http://boeing.com/farnborough and follow @boeing @boeingairplanes @boeingdefense  on X and Boeing on LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram and YouTube.","score":0.878825,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://airmedia24.com/news/boeing-brings-mq-28-ghost-bat-777x-and-global-partnerships-to-farnborough-international-airshow","title":"Boeing Brings MQ-28 Ghost Bat, 777X and Global Partnerships ...","content":"Boeing will also bring a CH-47 Chinook and a T-7 flight-deck simulator to the pavilion, giving visitors hands-on access to fighter-trainer","score":0.77487355,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.55,"request_id":"9aed5695-4be5-4743-921a-8fc69a76bac1"}
